subcodes.first_line: The All-Possessing addresseth thee, O 'Abdu'l-Ghani, saying: This is the Day of wealth wherein every impoverished one hath been enriched [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الغنی یخاطبک یا عبدالغنی و یقول هذا یوم الغنا و فیه استغنی کل ذی فقر و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual foundations of true knowledge, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
